title: Apply a marker through OMP cmux browser tools
prompt: Open the BrowserGym cmux fixture URL in the supplied scratch workspace. Use cmux browser tools to snapshot the page, fill #marker-input with provider-browsergym-marker, click #apply-marker, verify the applied marker in page text, capture a screenshot with cmux_browser_screenshot, and return only a short JSON object containing the surface ref and whether the marker was applied.
